semantic.role: Continuous Integration workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Automates code linting, building, testing, and packaging integrity checks
Triggers on pushes and pull requests to the main branch
Defines environment and dependency setup steps

English.purpose: Define the automated CI pipeline for the ArchSpine mirror system to ensure code quality and consistency on the main branch.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers contributing to the ArchSpine project. It provides a standardised workflow that runs linting, building, testing, and packaging checks automatically on every push or pull request to the main branch.
key_takeaways: CI runs on push/PR to main branch only
Includes lint, build, test, and packaging integrity checks

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 定义 ArchSpine 镜像系统的持续集成流水线，确保主分支上的代码质量和一致性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向参与 ArchSpine 项目的开发者。它提供了一个标准化的工作流，在每次推送到主分支或发起拉取请求时自动执行代码检查、构建、测试和打包完整性验证。
key_takeaways: CI 仅在推送到主分支或针对主分支的拉取请求时触发
使用 Node.js 20 并启用 npm 缓存
包含代码检查、构建、测试和打包完整性检查
并发组设置可取消重复的运行
